title: BigBear.ai Flat Revenue Masks Margin Surge; Backlog Jumps 14% as GenAI and National Security Wins Accelerate
text: BigBear.ai's Q1 2026 results showed flat revenue but masked significant margin improvement and backlog acceleration. While revenue remained essentially flat year-over-year at $34.4 million, gross margin expanded dramatically to 34% from 21.3%, and the company's backlog jumped 14% to $281.9 million. The growth in backlog was driven by wins in generative AI products and national security contracts, particularly the $53 million classified award, signaling strong future revenue potential.
